raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing about a charge that was on my statement and paid that was posted to my Citibank Double Cash account in the amount of {$990.00} posted XX/XX/2023. This was for a software subscription service that was nto provided by the seller. Soon after the amount was paid the provider ( XXXX XXXX, XXXX FL ) shut down his website and disappeared. He did not resond to emails. I notified Citibank and initiated a chargeback of this amount since the service was not provided. The dispute was filed online. It is my undertsanding if the service is not provided I am entitled to a chargeback. Citibank later refused that chargeback which I still dispute. I provided links to the closed wesbite and emails to the operator. As far as I am concerned this is pure fraud. 

This is the website. Shuttered for many months. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX? XXXX & XXXX & XXXX
